response:
{"action": "sql", "sql": "SELECT c.cust_id, COUNT(*) AS order_cnt
FROM ord_hdr o
JOIN cust_mstr c
  ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
  AND o.ord_dt >= c.eff_start_dt
  AND (c.eff_end_dt IS NULL OR o.ord_dt < c.eff_end_dt)
WHERE c.seg_cd = 'ENT'
GROUP BY c.cust_id
ORDER BY order_cnt DESC;", "reason": null}
